# Verii v1.1.3

## Changes

### [#602](https://github.com/LFDT-Verii/core/pull/602) Resolve release runtime dependency alerts
- Updated release-line runtime dependencies to pick up patched SpenceJS packages.
- Updated registrar `uuid` usage to the 14.x line.
- Added root dependency resolutions for Auth0 `uuid`, `dompurify`, and `follow-redirects` alert paths.

## Backward incompatibilities

- None.
